name: claude-context
description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

milvus_address.title: Milvus Address
milvus_address.description: Milvus or Zilliz Cloud endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:19530 or https://<cluster>.api.<region>.zillizcloud.com).

milvus_token.title: Milvus Token
milvus_token.description: Milvus / Zilliz Cloud access token. Stored in ~/.claude/settings.json (Claude Code's keychain-backed secret storage isn't wired up for plugin userConfig yet — issue anthropics/claude-code#39455).
